name: Autumn Chutney
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the fruit and vegetables together.
2. Transfer to a preserving pan (Note: these books call for an aluminum pan - I avoid using aluminum with acidic foods).
3. Add the remaining ingredients, except the sugar.
4. Simmer for about 30 minutes until tender.
5. Stir in the sugar and continue simmering gently until dissolved.
6. Continue simmering, stirring frequently, until thick (the time varies based on the water content of the fruits).
7. Allow to cool, then pack the chutney into clean jars.
8. Seal the jars tightly.
PS: Refrigerate after opening.
